corrections.correct: καὶ ἤρεσεν ὁ λόγος ἐνώπιον αὐτῶν.
corrections.note: Transcript omits καὶ ἤρεσεν at the start of v. 21.
Printed text reads συντελεῖ, not συντελεῖται.
Lemma division is wrong: apparatus has πασιν] then note on δὲ.

corrections.current:
συμμαχησει
(-σει Va) om ουν δωσουσιν ℵ* (hab ℵc.a)
corrections.correct:
συμμαχησει
(-σει Va) | om ουν δωσουσιν ℵ* (hab ℵc.a)
corrections.note: Missing separator bar before om ουν δωσουσιν.
Apparatus note is for addition of ουν in V, not repetition of the lemma.

corrections.current: και φυλαξονται φυλασσουσιν ℵ* (ὃς φυλάξωνται ℵc.a)
corrections.correct: και φυλαξονται] φυλασσουσιν ℵ* (ὡς φυλάξωνται ℵc.a)
corrections.note: Missing closing bracket after lemma; correction in parenthesis reads ὡς, not ὃς.
Printed apparatus uses ordinal sign 1º, not numeral 10.
Printed apparatus uses ordinal sign 2º, not numeral 20.
Lemma is ο βασιλευς, not ομ βασιλευς.

corrections.current:
δια της θαλασσης και δια της ξη-
(implrol δ. τ. θ. ℵ1 ει και ℵc.a)
corrections.correct:
δια της θαλασσης και δια της ξη-
ρας ℵ* (improb. δ. τ. θ. ℵ1 ει και ℵc.a)
corrections.note: Apparatus line omits ρας ℵ* and misreads improb. as implrol.

notes: Running head and marginal line numbers match. Body largely correct aside from omitted phrase in 8:21 and wrong verb form in 8:31. Apparatus contains several transcription errors, including omitted symbols and misread abbreviations.
